backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing a Ray Infotech MLM platform with user profile management, member registration, a 3-wide matrix tree structure, and commission/refund logic, protected by role-based access control.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping the Ray Infotech logo regeneration feature to its affected frontend files, related components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of all frontend source files, serving as a reference index for the project's React components, pages, hooks, and styles.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark color themes used throughout the UI.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell titled 'Ray Infotech MLM' that mounts the React app via a root div and module script entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with routes for home, register, dashboard, and admin pages, wrapped in ThemeProvider with Layout, ProfileSetupModal, and Toaster.
frontend/src/components/CommissionHistor: Displays a table of a member's commission and fee-refund earnings by traversing the downline tree to compute level depths and applying per-level commission rates.
Card component that calculates and displays a member's total earnings broken down into fee refund and commission totals by walking the downline tree.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Simple footer showing copyright year, Ray Infotech attribution, and a UTM-tracked caffeine.ai referral link with gold styling.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Renders the app header with logo, navigation links (Dashboard, Register Member, Admin), and an authentication button using Internet Identity. Handles login/logout flow and shows mobile-responsive navigation.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Simple layout wrapper that composes Header, Footer, and a main content area around child components.
frontend/src/components/MatrixTreeVisual: Renders a visual tree of MLM matrix members up to a configurable depth, showing member cards with name, ID, fee/refund status, and empty slot placeholders.
frontend/src/components/PlatformStatisti: Displays four stat cards (total members, fees collected, refunds issued, total commissions) calculated from the full member list, with loading skeletons.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal dialog that prompts newly authenticated users without a profile to enter their name and contact info, then saves it via a mutation hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, reinitializing and invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook that manage DFINITY AuthClient lifecycle, exposing identity, login/clear functions, and login status.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for backend actor calls including user profile, admin check, member registration, member listing, downlines, and joining fee management.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Inter/Poppins fonts, sets up Tailwind directives, and defines light/dark CSS custom properties for the Ray Infotech brand (deep navy + gold theme).
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider, InternetIdentityProvider, and the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPanel.tsx: Admin-only page that lists all members in a searchable, paginated table and allows marking joining fees as paid, with access guards for authentication and admin role.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx: Member dashboard page displaying stats, a member search, matrix tree visualization, commission history, and earnings summary, gated behind Internet Identity login.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Marketing landing page showcasing the Ray Infotech Matrix MLM platform with a hero section, commission level breakdown, and navigation to registration or login.
frontend/src/pages/RegisterPage.tsx: Member registration form page with validation for name, mobile, email, and optional sponsor ID, displaying the new member ID on success and gated behind login.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with helpers to persist, retrieve, and clear those parameters via sessionStorage and history.replaceState.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the Ray Infotech frontend, extending the theme with custom navy/gold brand colors, Inter/Poppins fonts, oklch-based semantic color tokens, and accordion animations.
project_state.json: Project state manifest describing the Ray Infotech MLM web app's architecture, commission rules, existing features, known issues, and an image fix request for the brand logo.
